app.title: Show HN: Yamanote.fun – A complete soundscape for Tokyo's Yamanote line
app.author: madebymagnolia
app.description: An interactive soundscapes of Tokyo's Yamanote Line
proposed_tests: Run Yamanote-fun, listen to and visualize Tokyo soundscape
Annotate and export a segment of the Yamanote audio, check output quality
Create your own interactive Tokyo soundscape with yamanote-fun
